name: clockin-clockout
description: Build local del SPA Clock System: extrae JSX inline y lo compila a JS plano para servir con CSP sin unsafe-inline.

scripts.build: babel public/assets/app.jsx --presets=@babel/preset-react --out-file public/assets/app.js --no-comments && node node_modules/tailwindcss/lib/cli.js -i public/assets/tailwind.css -o public/assets/tailwind.min.css --minify
